violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener and mixer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

Thermometers are lacking in the (all ) refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

The following non-food contact surfaces of the have an accumulation of debris: 1.prep units and refrigerators observed with food and debris. 2.side of stove and hose have grease buildup. 3.sandwich storage cart have food and soil residue. 4.exterior of dough mixer has food debris. 5.pot/pan holder observed with dust. 3. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026
Hot water is lacking at handsink in kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (basement and dumpster) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026
The ceilings and ceiling vents has an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
Can lids and strainer were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (cooked chicken breast) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer, dough mixer and ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and/or other debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

Thermometers are lacking in the (all) refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

Working containers of (dry ingredients and condiment containers) are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

(Frozen smoothies and desserts ) packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

(Various food product and/or single service items ) were observed stored on the floor in the (walk in cooler and basement ). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of (dry ingredients ). Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
(Chest freezers ) located in the (basement ) area was not in good repair. Observed lids being wrapped in duct tape. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

The cutting boards in the (kitchen ) are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of debris:1.all prep units and refrigerators observed with food and/ other debris2.side of stove and connecting hose have food debris and grease3.grill shelves4.all prep unit shelves bottom shelve have soil residue and food debris5.spice table shelves observed with food debris6.sandwich storage cart have food and soil residue7.condiment squeeze container observed with food residue8.retail shelves have dust9.exterior of dough mixer has food debris10.lights above pizza prep observed with dust and food debris New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
The handwashing sink in the kitchen observed in poor repair. Observed heavy leakage.PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2026

The floors and walls in kitchen and walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (basement) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

The (ceiling and ceiling vents ) in the (retail ) area has an accumulation dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
The (ceilings ) in the (retail) area is in poor repair.Observed water stains The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2026
Chest Freezers located in the basement area was not in good repair(observed freezers hoods wrapped in duct tape). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024

The following physical facilities observed with debris: 1.ceilings in the retail area and kitchen observed with water stains. 2.ceiling vents in retail area have an accumulation of dust. 3.floors in the walk in cooler have soil and food residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/29/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed under the stairs in basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
Plastic container were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener and slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024

Various food product was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024

Cereals and desserts packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of dry foods . Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
Chest freezers located in the basement area was not in good repair(observed freezer hoods wrapped in duct tape). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the food storage shelves in retail area have an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area including under basement stairs. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024

The following physical facilities observed with debris: 1.ceilings in retail area, kitchen, and walk in cooler observed with an accumulation of dust and/or water stains. 2.floors in walk in have soil residue and food debris. 3.floors in basement observed with soil residue, dust , and other debris. 4.walls in walk in cooler have soil and food residue. 5.fans and fan unit in walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust. Physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/29/2024
Inspector observed patches of flooring in the walk in cooler in poor repair . The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/26/2024
